description_long: This is a modern, tactical rifle featuring a robust black metal body with a collapsible stock and a prominent bipod for stability during firing. The rifle is equipped with a large optical scope mounted on the top rail, enhancing its accuracy for long-range targeting. The handguard and receiver area display multiple accessory rails, allowing for the attachment of additional tactical equipment. A detachable box magazine is visible beneath the receiver, and the barrel is fitted with a flash hider at the muzzle. The pistol grip and adjustable stock are ergonomically designed for comfort and control. The overall design suggests a weapon intended for military or law enforcement use in urban environments.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, bipod, optical scope, and detachable box magazine, finished in matte black. It features accessory rails and a flash hider for urban combat scenarios.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the collapsible stock, scope, bipod, and magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the bipod stance, barrel, and the alignment of the scope and rails.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the stock, scope, magazine, and bipod from the other profile.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock, pistol grip, and the symmetry of the bipod legs.
